footnotes.text: The old and the new commandments are really one and the same commandment of love, promulgated in the Old Testament, but renewed by Christ, especially in the new motives and other helps supplied by Him.

It is the last hour: the meaning probably is that it is the last age of the world, the age of the Church. How long it will last no one knows. Antichrist: St. John supposes that the doctrine concerning the coming of Antichrist is already known to his readers. "Antichrist" is commonly understood as a personal opponent of Christ at the end of time. Cf. 2 John 7.
Anointing from the Holy One: the expression is usually understood to refer to the conferring of the Holy Spirit.
